name: qx9_share_late2
drl:
query BVals(long $v)
    B(k == $v)
end

rule QR1 salience 10
when
    ?BVals($x;)
then
    insert(new Out(1, $x));
end

rule R0 salience 5
when
    T(t == 0)
then
    insert(new B(10));
    insert(new B(20));
end

rule QR2 salience -5
when
    ?BVals($x;)
then
    insert(new Out(2, $x));
end
